title: Tell Me, Sister
prompt: Translate the Korean phrase '말해줘요 언니' into English.
hint: It is a request to an older sister or close female friend to speak or tell something.
ja: {'prompt': '말해줘요 언니를 영어로 번역하세요.', 'hint': '언니에게 무언가 말해달라고 요청하는 표현입니다.', 'sample': 'Tell me, sister.'}
local: {'prompt': '말해줘요 언니를 영어로 번역하세요.', 'hint': '언니에게 무언가 말해달라고 요청하는 표현입니다.', 'sample': 'Tell me, sister.'}
local_pron: {'prompt': 'Malhaejwoyo eonni reul yeongeoro beonyeokhaseyo.', 'hint': 'Eonni ege mueonga malhaedalago yocheonghaneun pyohyeomimnida.', 'sample': 'Tell me, sister.'}

title: Crying in My Room
prompt: Explain the meaning of the phrase 'crying in my room' in English.
hint: It describes someone feeling sad and crying alone in their private space.
sample: Crying alone in my room means feeling sad and isolated.
ja: {'prompt': "'crying in my room'의 의미를 영어로 설명하세요.", 'hint': '혼자 방에서 슬퍼하며 우는 상태를 나타냅니다.', 'sample': 'Crying alone in my room means feeling sad and isolated.'}

title: I Want It More
prompt: Translate and explain the phrase 'But still I want it more, more, more' in English.
hint: It expresses a strong desire to have or achieve something repeatedly or intensely.
sample: But still I want it more, more, more means I have a strong desire to get more.

title: Second Chance
prompt: Explain the meaning of 'I give a second chance to give back' in English.
hint: It means offering another opportunity to repay or make amends.
sample: I give a second chance to give back means I try again to make things right.
ja: {'prompt': "'I give a second chance to give back'의 의미를 영어로 설명하세요.", 'hint': '다시 한 번 기회를 주어 보답하려는 뜻입니다.', 'sample': 'I give a second chance to give back means I try again to make things right.'}

title: I'm Stupid
prompt: Translate and explain the phrase '날 믿은 내가 정말 stupid' in English.
hint: It means 'I who trusted you am really stupid'.
sample: I who trusted you am really stupid.
